title: Oden’s Sacrifice Sends the Scabbards to the Future
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kinemon, Denjiro, Zoro, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
scene: Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sorry, I didn't mean to sink your ship,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I only disabled the cannons that were aimed at us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We aren't the enemy, why would you do something like that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That guy is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: That's the success- SoR to boss Hyogorogoro,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The current boss of the Capital's Under- World...!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Noble Samurai of the Red Scabbards!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am a Yakuza of the flower capital,

dialogue.speaker: Denjiro
dialogue.text: People call me "napping kyoshiro"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Be on your guard,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He is a very competent swordsman!!!

dialogue.speaker: Denjiro
dialogue.text: Our 200 men from the Kyoshiro family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Humbly ask to join your army!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What is the meaning of this, boss!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WHAT KIND OF LOGIC IS THAT!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I owe an immense debt of gratitude to the Kozuki family!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kachik!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kiv!! Something I often recall is the "Mountain God INCIDENT" that occurred in the capital 40 years ago.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to the world around us, it was the result of Lord Oden's neck- lessness...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But that wasn't it, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: "Kim"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WhIP!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That incident was caused by you, who was young and greedy back then!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What the...!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There should only be one person who knows the truth of that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is bad, it'll be my fault that the capital will....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are you...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: DEN- JIRO!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WHATA-!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: None other!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: As I thought, you didn't recognize me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wanted to reveal myself to you guys as soon as I could,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: but I prepared for the worst case scenario and continued on as an enemy....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was just as I thought, if I revealed myself...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Dengiro!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My true identity would have been exposed to the traitor.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The first time I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: den- jiro...

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: And Orochi would have disposed of me....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I kept Orochi's trust until the very end, and as a result...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The 1000 Samuel trapped in the "RaseTSU Town Prison"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Have been freed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please allow me to add these 1200 soldiers to your army!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Whaaa AAA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The day has finally come! We'll also be joining the fight!!!

dialogue.speaker: Denjiro
dialogue.text: Boss Kyoshiro was...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: One of the nine Red Scabbards!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Contact Onigashima immediately!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Kim!! As expected of a man as sharp as you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuie altered the original code of Port Habu with two lines through the belly of the viper!!*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These two lines carried the meaning of erasing the belly, in other words "cutting out the middle".

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If one was to cut out the middle of port habit (ha BU mi na to) they would read the message as Hato* and therefore...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You sent out the message of only two lines to everyone.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, you had guessed that Crochi has an information within the core of your ranks, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Pregnancy Agreement

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You purposefully told only your closest comrades the incorrect message of Port Tobage!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The traitor then perfectly conveyed the message of Port ToKage on to Oroch!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden’s Fall and the Scabbards’ Future storyline with 57 dialogue beats. Oden’s execution and Toki’s final act send the Kozuki retainers toward the future and reveal how Wano’s tragedy endured.
